results.title: EnSight Technologies to Deliver Parking Guidance for Connecticut Dot’s New Stamford Parking Garage
results.description: EnSight Technologies has been chosen to deliver a vision-based parking occupancy management and guidance system for the new Stamford Parking Garage in Stamford, Connecticut, a Connecticut Department of Transportation (CTDOT) project located adjacent to ...

results.title: Is Meta building its own version of Reddit?
results.description: Meta has quietly launched a new app called Forum. The app was discovered by Geekout Newsletter's Matt Navarra in the App Store.
